mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) as total_amount, IFNULL(SUM(registration_fee),0) as total_registration_fee, IFNULL(SUM(drug_fee),0) as total_drug_fee, IFNULL(SUM(exam_fee),0) as total_exam_fee FROM settlement WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1,3) AND DATE(settle_time) = #{date}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count, IFNULL(SUM(actual_amount),0) as total_amount, IFNULL(SUM(registration_fee),0) as total_registration_fee, IFNULL(SUM(drug_fee),0) as total_drug_fee, IFNULL(SUM(exam_fee),0) as total_exam_fee FROM settlement WHERE deleted = 0 AND status IN (1,3) AND DATE_FORMAT(settle_time, '%Y-%m') = #{month}
